programme.title: Backcountry Rescue
programme.desc: Teton County Search & Rescue races to save a teen who drove a snowmobile off a cliff.

programme.title: Backcountry Rescue
programme.desc: SAR uses helicopters and controlled detonations for a rescue where calculated risks and courage are vital.

programme.title: Backcountry Rescue
programme.desc: A mountain biker crashes on a remote trail. SAR performs a long-line helicopter rescue against the clock.

programme.title: Backcountry Rescue
programme.desc: Teton County SAR faces its toughest day yet: a lost hiker, a snowmobile crash, and an avalanche.

programme.title: Ski A&E
programme.desc: The snowpark in Val Thorens has dozens of jumps and pipes, which call for many accidents and rescues!

programme.title: Dirt
programme.desc: Experience the "wild kinship" of the North Atlantic, culminating in a traditional Newfoundland shed party.

programme.desc: Orlando Duque and Jonathan Paredes are in awe at the cliffs they are about to leap from in Zambia, Africa.

programme.title: Surfing 28 States
programme.desc: Celebrating the Festival of Lights and braving the polluted Ganges River in search of a spiritual surf.

programme.title: Surfing 28 States
programme.sub-title: NE India: Jungle Exploration and Jail
programme.desc: Exploring Kaziranga National Park and getting caught in an off-limits state while searching for hidden water.

programme.title: Rob Warner’s Wild Rides
programme.desc: Rob Warner travels to Ecuador with rising MTB star Finn Iles to take on the Cotopaxi in the Andes.

programme.title: Rob Warner’s Wild Rides
programme.desc: Rob Warner and downhill pro Olly Wilkins ride around the Himalayas in Nepal.

programme.title: The Road Less Eaten with Biju Thomas
programme.sub-title: Maine: Local Cuisine and Coastal Adventures
programme.desc: Biju visits Maine to take in the outdoor adventures, exploring off-the-beaten-path dining experiences.

programme.title: The Road Less Eaten with Biju Thomas
programme.sub-title: Tucson, AZ: Desert Hotspots and Off-The-Beaten-Path Eats
programme.desc: Biju travels to Tucson, Arizona, seeking experiences from trendy hotspots to entirely off-the-beaten-path.

programme.desc: Musician and adventurer Goth Babe brings his indie spirit to the misty wilds of Olympic National Park.

programme.desc: Chef Khanh Ong Travels to Mallacoota Victoria to explore the seafood delicacies the area.

programme.sub-title: What If Feeling Small Is Good For You?

programme.desc: Scott and Ellis cross New Zealand's North Island to board a sunken cruise ship.
